prompt: Close-up of sun-warmed linen fabric draped over a stone surface, with dappled Mediterranean sunlight filtering through unseen leaves creating soft shadow patterns. Warm ochre and terracotta tones. A single ripe peach or fig resting on the linen, slightly soft focus. Honey-gold light wrapping around textures. Sensual, tactile, 16:9, photorealistic.
negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, collage, split screen, multi-panel, low detail, cluttered composition, extra objects, cartoon, illustration, CGI look, unreadable signage, oversharpening

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: high detail, bold shapes, small-size readability
